query:
SELECT 'weekly_reportage' as tbl, section, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM weekly_reportage WHERE section NOT IN ('ai', 'startup', 'dealroom') GROUP BY section
UNION ALL
SELECT 'startup_of_day', section, COUNT(*) FROM startup_of_day WHERE section NOT IN ('ai', 'startup', 'dealroom') GROUP BY section
UNION ALL
SELECT 'content_audit', section, COUNT(*) FROM content_audit WHERE section NOT IN ('ai', 'startup', 'dealroom') GROUP BY section;
